title: Physical Keyboard Focus and Event Repair
notes: Repairs Physical Keyboard mode when the blue active-field outline appeared but Edge did not give the input true typing focus.
Keyboard mode now intercepts the original mobile pointer, click, and focus handlers before they can reopen the touch keypad or cancel browser focus.
A document-level keyboard handler keeps number-row and numpad entry working even if browser focus temporarily falls back to the modal or page body.
Clicking Overburden, Depth, Stemming, Primary Load, Secondary Load, or Timing now selects and visibly highlights that exact field.
Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter Save + Next, Ctrl+Enter Save & Close, load-field A/D entry, and the Keyboard Mode indicator remain included.
Touch Keypad mode and every m39.5/m39.6 pattern, shot-volume, PDF, load, selection, GPS, condition, backup, theme, and offline feature remain included.
